architectural_notes: Scope constraint: Only restore 'Kontakt erstellen' and 'Link erstellen'; leave all other functionality unchanged.

existing_features.title: Fix the end-to-end "Create contact" flow on the Contacts page so a newly created contact is persisted for the logged-in user and appears immediately in the contacts list after submission.
Fix the end-to-end "Create link" flow on the Contacts page so a newly created helpful link is persisted for the logged-in user and appears immediately in the links list after submission.
Ensure no other app functionality or UI behavior is changed beyond what is required to restore "Create contact" and "Create link" on the Contacts page.

projectName: Restore Contacts page functionality: create contact and create link
